name: DataTable
description: DataTable displays data in tabular format.

props.name: value
props.description: An array of objects to display.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Name of the field that uniquely identifies the a record in the data.

props.name: rows
props.description: Number of rows to display per page.

props.name: first
props.description: Index of the first row to be displayed.

props.name: totalRecords
props.description: Number of total records, defaults to length of value when not defined.

props.name: paginator
props.description: When specified as true, enables the pagination.

props.name: paginatorPosition
props.description: Position of the paginator, options are 'top','bottom' or 'both'.

props.name: alwaysShowPaginator
props.description: Whether to show it even there is only one page.

props.name: paginatorTemplate
props.description: Template of the paginator. It can be customized using the template property using the predefined keys. - FirstPageLink - PrevPageLink - PageLinks - NextPageLink - LastPageLink - RowsPerPageDropdown - JumpToPageDropdown - JumpToPageInput - CurrentPageReport
props.default: FirstPageLink PrevPageLink PageLinks NextPageLink LastPageLink RowsPerPageDropdown

props.name: pageLinkSize
props.description: Number of page links to display.

props.name: rowsPerPageOptions
props.description: Array of integer values to display inside rows per page dropdown.

props.name: currentPageReportTemplate
props.description: Template of the current page report element. It displays information about the pagination state. Available placeholders are the following; - {currentPage} - {totalPages} - {rows} - {first} - {last} - {totalRecords}

props.name: lazy
props.description: Defines if data is loaded and interacted with in lazy manner.

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays a loader to indicate data load is in progress.

props.name: loadingIcon
props.description: The icon to show while indicating data load is in progress.

props.name: sortField
props.description: Property name or a getter function of a row data used for sorting by default

props.name: sortOrder
props.description: Order to sort the data by default.

props.name: nullSortOrder
props.description: Determines how null values are sorted.

props.name: defaultSortOrder
props.description: Default sort order of an unsorted column.

props.name: multiSortMeta
props.description: An array of SortMeta objects to sort the data.

props.name: sortMode
props.description: Defines whether sorting works on single column or on multiple columns.

props.name: removableSort
props.description: When enabled, columns can have an un-sorted state.

props.name: filters
props.description: Filters object with key-value pairs to define the filters.

props.name: filterDisplay
props.description: Layout of the filter elements.

props.name: globalFilterFields
props.description: An array of fields as string or function to use in global filtering.

props.name: filterLocale
props.description: Locale to use in filtering. The default locale is the host environment's current locale.

props.name: selection
props.description: Selected row in single mode or an array of values in multiple mode.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Specifies the selection mode.

props.name: compareSelectionBy
props.description: Algorithm to define if a row is selected.

props.name: metaKeySelection
props.description: Defines whether metaKey is requred or not for the selection. When true metaKey needs to be pressed to select or unselect an item and when set to false selection of each item can be toggled individually. On touch enabled devices, metaKeySelection is turned off automatically.

props.name: contextMenu
props.description: Enables context menu integration.

props.name: contextMenuSelection
props.description: Selected row instance with the ContextMenu.

props.name: selectAll
props.description: Whether all data is selected.

props.name: rowHover
props.description: When enabled, background of the rows change on hover.

props.name: csvSeparator
props.description: Character to use as the csv separator.

props.name: exportFilename
props.description: Name of the exported file.

props.name: exportFunction
props.description: Custom function to export data.

props.name: resizableColumns
props.description: When enabled, columns can be resized using drag and drop.

props.name: columnResizeMode
props.description: Defines whether the overall table width.

props.name: reorderableColumns
props.description: When enabled, columns can be reordered using drag and drop.

props.name: expandedRows
props.description: A collection of row data display as expanded.

props.name: expandedRowIcon
props.description: Icon of the row toggler to display the row as expanded.

props.name: collapsedRowIcon
props.description: Icon of the row toggler to display the row as collapsed.

props.name: rowGroupMode
props.description: Defines the row group mode.

props.name: groupRowsBy
props.description: One or more field names to use in row grouping.

props.name: expandableRowGroups
props.description: Whether the row groups can be expandable.

props.name: expandedRowGroups
props.description: An array of group field values whose groups would be rendered as expanded.

props.name: stateStorage
props.description: Defines where a stateful table keeps its state.

props.name: stateKey
props.description: Unique identifier of a stateful table to use in state storage.

props.name: editMode
props.description: Defines the incell editing mode.

props.name: editingRows
props.description: A collection of rows to represent the current editing data in row edit mode.

props.name: rowClass
props.description: A function that takes the row data as a parameter and returns a string to apply a particular class for the row. The return value is added to the row's :classes array (see Vue.js class bindings).

props.name: rowStyle
props.description: A function that takes the row data as a parameter and returns the inline style object for the corresponding row. The function may also return an array of style objects which will be merged. The return value of this function is directly applied as a Vue.js style-binding on the table row.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: When specified, enables horizontal and/or vertical scrolling.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Height of the scroll viewport in fixed pixels or the 'flex' keyword for a dynamic size.

props.name: virtualScrollerOptions
props.description: Whether to use the virtualScroller feature. The properties of VirtualScroller component can be used like an object in it. Note: Currently only vertical orientation mode is supported.

props.name: frozenValue
props.description: Items of the frozen part in scrollable DataTable.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary when using stack responsive layout.

props.name: showHeaders
props.description: Whether to display table headers

props.name: showGridlines
props.description: Whether to show grid lines between cells.

props.name: stripedRows
props.description: Whether to displays rows with alternating colors.

props.name: highlightOnSelect
props.description: Highlights automatically the first item. @defaultValue false

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the table.

props.name: tableStyle
props.description: Inline style of the table element.

props.name: tableClass
props.description: Style class of the table element.

props.name: tableProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the TableHTMLAttributes to table element inside the component.

props.name: filterInputProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLInputElement to the focusable filter input element inside the component.

props.name: filterButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all filter button property object filter: { severity: 'secondary', text: true, rounded: true }, inline: { clear: { severity: 'secondary', text: true, rounded: true } }, popover: { addRule: { severity: 'info', text: true, size: 'small' }, removeRule: { severity: 'danger', text: true, size: 'small' }, apply: { size: 'small' }, clear: { outlined: true, size: 'small' } } }

props.name: editButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all edit button property object init: { severity: 'secondary', text: true, rounded: true }, save: { severity: 'secondary', text: true, rounded: true }, cancel: { severity: 'secondary', text: true, rounded: true } }

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: update:first
events.description: Emitted when the first changes.

events.name: update:rows
events.description: Emitted when the rows changes.

events.name: update:sortField
events.description: Emitted when the sortField changes.

events.name: update:sortOrder
events.description: Emitted when the sortOrder changes.

events.name: update:multiSortMeta
events.description: Emitted when the multiSortMeta changes.

events.name: update:selection
events.description: Emitted when the selection changes.

events.name: update:contextMenuSelection
events.description: Emitted when the contextMenuSelection changes.

events.name: update:expandedRows
events.description: Emitted when the expandedRows changes.

events.name: update:expandedRowGroups
events.description: Emitted when the expandedRowGroups changes.

events.name: update:filters
events.description: Emitted when the filters changes.

events.name: update:editingRows
events.description: Emitted when the editingRows changes.

events.name: page
events.description: Callback to invoke on pagination. Sort and Filter information is also available for lazy loading implementation.

events.name: sort
events.description: Callback to invoke on sort. Page and Filter information is also available for lazy loading implementation.

events.name: filter
events.description: Event to emit after filtering, not triggered in lazy mode.

events.name: value-change
events.description: Callback to invoke after filtering, sorting, pagination and cell editing to pass the rendered value.

events.name: row-click
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is clicked.

events.name: row-dblclick
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is double clicked.

events.name: row-contextmenu
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is selected with a ContextMenu.

events.name: row-select
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is selected.

events.name: row-select-all
events.description: Fired when header checkbox is checked.

events.name: row-unselect-all
events.description: Fired when header checkbox is unchecked.

events.name: row-unselect
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is unselected.

events.name: select-all-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when all data is selected.

events.name: column-resize-end
events.description: Callback to invoke when a column is resized.

events.name: column-reorder
events.description: Callback to invoke when a column is reordered.

events.name: row-reorder
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is reordered.

events.name: row-expand
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is expanded.

events.name: row-collapse
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row is collapsed.

events.name: rowgroup-expand
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row group is expanded.

events.name: rowgroup-collapse
events.description: Callback to invoke when a row group is collapsed.

events.name: cell-edit-init
events.description: Callback to invoke when cell edit is initiated.

events.name: cell-edit-complete
events.description: Callback to invoke when cell edit is completed.

events.name: cell-edit-cancel
events.description: Callback to invoke when cell edit is cancelled with escape key.

events.name: row-edit-init
events.description: Callback to invoke when row edit is initiated.

events.name: row-edit-save
events.description: Callback to invoke when row edit is saved.

events.name: row-edit-cancel
events.description: Callback to invoke when row edit is cancelled.

events.name: state-restore
events.description: Invoked when a stateful table restores the state.

events.name: state-save
events.description: Invoked when a stateful table saves the state.

slots.name: header
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: footer
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: empty
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: groupheader
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Row data */ data: T; /** * Row index */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: groupfooter
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Row data */ data: T; /** * Row index */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: loading
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: expansion
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Row data */ data: T; /** * Row index */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: loadingicon
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: reorderindicatorupicon
slots.type: (): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom row reorder indicator up icon template.

slots.name: rowreorderindicatorupicon
slots.type: (): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom row reorder indicator up icon template.

slots.name: reorderindicatordownicon
slots.type: (): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom reorder indicator down icon template.

slots.name: rowreorderindicatordownicon
slots.type: (): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom reorder indicator down icon template.

slots.name: rowgrouptogglericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current rowgroup's expanded state. */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: paginatorcontainer
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Index of first record */ first: number; /** * Index of last record */ last: number; /** * Number of rows to display in new page */ rows: number; /** * New page number */ page: number; /** * Total number of pages */ pageCount?: number; /** * Direct page links */ pageLinks?: number; /** * Total records */ totalRecords?: number; /** * First page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ firstPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Last page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ lastPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Previous page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ prevPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Next page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ nextPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Row change function. */ rowChangeCallback: (value: number) => void; /** * Page change function. */ changePageCallback: (value: number) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: paginatorstart
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: paginatorend
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: paginatorfirstpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the paginator first page link icon. * @param {Object} scope - paginatorfirstpagelinkicon's params. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom paginator first page link icon template.

slots.name: paginatorprevpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the paginator prev page link icon. * @param {Object} scope - paginatorprevpagelinkicon's params. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom paginator previous page link icon template.

slots.name: paginatornextpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the paginator next page link icon. * @param {Object} scope - paginatornextpagelinkicon's params. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom paginator next page link icon template.

slots.name: paginatorlastpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the paginator last page link icon. * @param {Object} scope - paginatorlastpagelinkicon's params. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom paginator last page link icon template.

slots.name: paginatorrowsperpagedropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the paginator rows per page dropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: paginatorjumptopagedropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the paginator jump to page dropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
